task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'WarningLabel' object is highlighted in the Outliner or selected in the 3D Viewport.

task_completion.description: Add a Shrinkwrap modifier to the WarningLabel
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Modifiers Properties tab (wrench icon) is open and a 'Shrinkwrap' modifier has been added to the WarningLabel.

task_completion.description: Set the Shrinkwrap target to IndustrialPipe
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the Shrinkwrap modifier settings, the 'Target' field is populated with 'IndustrialPipe'.

task_completion.description: Set the modifier offset to prevent Z-fighting while staying close to the surface
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the Shrinkwrap modifier settings, the 'Offset' value is set to a number between 0.005m and 0.02m.
The Shrinkwrap modifier remains visible in the modifier stack (it has not been 'Applied' or removed) while the label visually conforms to the pipe in the 3D viewport.

task_completion.description: Save the project to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog shows the path '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/pipe_decal.blend', or the Blender window title bar updates to show 'pipe_decal.blend'.

integrity.description: Agent used the Blender GUI to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent navigating Blender's UI (Modifiers tab, Outliner, 3D Viewport) rather than executing a Python script in a terminal to bypass the interface.

integrity.description: Agent actually used the Shrinkwrap modifier instead of manually deforming the mesh
integrity.visual_evidence: The Shrinkwrap modifier panel is clearly visible with the correct settings, rather than the agent entering Edit Mode and manually moving vertices to fake the curve.

integrity.description: Agent saved the file through genuine software interaction
integrity.visual_evidence: The File > Save As menu or dialog is visible, confirming the agent interacted with the application's save functionality.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Object: 'IndustrialPipe'. Label Object: 'WarningLabel'. Required Modifier: Shrinkwrap. Offset constraint: Must be between 0.005m and 0.02m to prevent Z-fighting. Non-destructive requirement: The modifier must remain in the stack and NOT be applied. Output file path: '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/pipe_decal.blend'.
